title: No Orchids for Miss Blandish
writer: James Hadley Chase, St. John Legh Clowes
actors: Jack La Rue, Hugh McDermott, Linden Travers
plot: John Blandish is worth $100 million. His heiress daughter is soon to be wed to Foster Harvey, who believes she's a cold, unfeeling woman, despite loving her. Her cold emotional state is in large part due to leading a restricted li...
